Reset progress?

This will clear all ticks, notes, journal entries and images in this browser. This cannot be undone.

How to use this guide

This workbook is your personal evidence tracker for the Web Development unit. Set up your profile (name, teacher, class) then use each section to record your learning journey.

  • Dropdown menus — navigate between sections.
  • Timer — start when class begins to see where you should be at any moment.
  • Export Work Package — creates a signed ZIP-style JSON with all your evidence for your teacher.
  • Snapshot — takes a timestamped integrity snapshot of your current progress.
  • Archive — view past snapshots to show ongoing effort.
  • Image uploads — attach screenshots in journal/evidence entries (stored as Base64).

Fingerprint ID is auto-generated and tied to this browser. Your teacher can verify snapshots using their companion app and the class key.
